commentary.text: Fawcett beats Howard to mark a Grlj long ball to the top of the square for some garbage.
Marshall threads a set shot from 45m on the boundary.
Hall hits the post from 20m after zipping through another forward 50 stoppage.
Holding free to Hall on Short at a stoppage, Garcia plays on to advantage to snap the goal from the hotspot.
Lynch marks a Ross pass 40m out near the boundary in front of Silvagni and Howard, he threads a fabulous drop punt!
Faull gets a holding free on Wilkie 50m out on a slight angle, his kick is across the face to the left.
Lynch has been extremely quiet but gets his first goal from Taranto's centre clearance from 20m.
Hall is paid a mark from a Carroll pass 45m out in front despite a late-ish spoil by Ross. He makes no mistake.
Grlj weaves through the centre and passes over Flanders to Taranto in the pocket 30m out. T-Bone hits the far right post with a J-curve set shot off the right.
Hill baulks away from Cumming and passes across half forward for Flanders 45m out in the corridor, whose set shot dies in its trajectory and is rushed.
#####St Kilda loses Mitch Owens but regains Jack Higgins, while the Tigers copped another two injuries last week to take their injury list to a full 18.
The game played out pretty much as expected: some lively play by Richmond early but they just didn't have the cattle on the park.
